creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193484
Patch adding a new games/genact port (0.4.0, revision: 2)

(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #4)

Thanks for the review and notes about libc. I'll keep that in mind in my future Rust ports.

There's also `make cargo-crates-licenses | awk '{$1=""; print $0}' | sort --unique` which yields:

 Apache-2.0"
 Apache-2.0/MIT
 BSD-3-Clause
 ISC
 MIT
 MIT / Apache-2.0
 MIT/Apache-2.0
 Unlicense/MIT

I updated the Makefile accordingly.
